label: World-model rollout & imagination

node.label: World-model rollout & imagination
node.definition: World-model rollout simulates possible futures in learned latent or observation space so a policy or planner can evaluate actions without immediate real-world interaction.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, World-model rollout & imagination is modeled as depending on Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning and feeding downstream nodes such as Robotics & embodied AI.

combined with Latent world models & predictive dynamics
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning.
